interpretation.guarded_structural_abstain: abstains structural detector failures, matching exp93's safe route
interpretation.observed_naive: runs interval+repair on the detector table exactly as emitted
interpretation.oracle_object_hypothesis: exp94-style upper bound using true structural anomaly metadata
interpretation.scored_non_oracle: generates and ranks object-table candidates without affected_ids, source_ids, or false_positive_ids; remaining gaps expose identity/cardinality ranking work
